proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009` = 1 have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines without that value.
Cell lines with `feature_022` = 1 have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines without that value.
Cell lines with `feature_024` = 1 have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines without that value.
Cell lines with `feature_014` = 1 have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines without that value.
Cell lines with `feature_027` = 1 have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines without that value.
Cell lines with `feature_011` = "colorectal" have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines without that value.
Higher values of `feature_026` are associated with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores.
Higher values of `feature_016` are associated with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores.
Higher values of `feature_016` are associated with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores.
Higher values of `feature_016` are associated with more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate level-vs-rest screen: feature_009=1 had mean dependency_BRAF -0.8047 vs -0.2495 in all other lines; signed difference -0.5552 with p=0 (normal approximation to Welch test; n=5573 vs undefined).

Univariate level-vs-rest screen: feature_022=1 had mean dependency_EGFR -0.6011 vs -0.2524 in all other lines; signed difference -0.3488 with p=0 (normal approximation to Welch test; n=3879 vs undefined).

Univariate level-vs-rest screen: feature_024=1 had mean dependency_ERBB2 -0.6856 vs -0.2535 in all other lines; signed difference -0.4322 with p=0 (normal approximation to Welch test; n=4889 vs undefined).

Univariate level-vs-rest screen: feature_014=1 had mean dependency_KRAS -0.5594 vs -0.2519 in all other lines; signed difference -0.3075 with p=0 (normal approximation to Welch test; n=11840 vs undefined).

Univariate level-vs-rest screen: feature_027=1 had mean dependency_RIT1 -0.3527 vs -0.2572 in all other lines; signed difference -0.0956 with p=0 (normal approximation to Welch test; n=4560 vs undefined).

Univariate level-vs-rest screen: feature_011="colorectal" had mean dependency_KIF18A -0.7204 vs -0.2524 in all other lines; signed difference -0.4680 with p=0 (normal approximation to Welch test; n=5815 vs undefined).
Univariate slope screen: each one-unit increase in feature_026 changed dependency_TMED10 by -0.1042; p=1.332e-15.
Univariate slope screen: each one-unit increase in feature_016 changed dependency_DHX9 by -0.1086; p=0.
Univariate slope screen: each one-unit increase in feature_016 changed dependency_POLR2A by -0.3049; p=0.
Univariate slope screen: each one-unit increase in feature_016 changed dependency_RPL11 by -0.1150; p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" and `feature_014` = 0 has less negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all other cell lines.
The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_011` = "prostate" and `feature_021` = 1 has less negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than all other cell lines.
The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" and `feature_027` = 0 has more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than all other cell lines.
The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" and `feature_020` = 1 has less negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all other cell lines.
The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" and `feature_021` = 1 has less negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than all other cell lines.
The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_011` = "colorectal" and `feature_035` = 0 has less negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.
The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" and `feature_014` = 1 has less negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than all other cell lines.
The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" and `feature_022` = 0 has more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other cell lines.
The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_010` = "basal" and `feature_030` = 0 has less negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than all other cell lines.
The two-feature subgroup defined by `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" and `feature_020` = 1 has less negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_BRAF: subgroup `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_014` = 0 had mean -0.2811 vs -0.3119 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect 0.0308, p=0.0154. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.1049 (p=9.644e-4).

Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_EGFR: subgroup `feature_011` = "prostate" AND `feature_021` = 1 had mean -0.1938 vs -0.2796 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect 0.0859, p=0.0038. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.0946 (p=0.0026).

Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_ERBB2: subgroup `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_027` = 0 had mean -0.3151 vs -0.2954 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect -0.0197, p=0.1354. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.0936 (p=0.0201).

Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_KRAS: subgroup `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_020` = 1 had mean -0.2511 vs -0.3249 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect 0.0738, p=0.0348. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.0892 (p=0.0174).

Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_RIT1: subgroup `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_021` = 1 had mean -0.1809 vs -0.2660 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect 0.0850, p=0.0201. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.0804 (p=0.0391).

Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_KIF18A: subgroup `feature_011` = "colorectal" AND `feature_035` = 0 had mean -0.2592 vs -0.3087 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect 0.0495, p=4.183e-9. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.6826 (p=0).

Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_TMED10: subgroup `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_014` = 1 had mean -0.1528 vs -0.2543 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect 0.1015, p=0.0017. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.1187 (p=5.613e-4).

Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_DHX9: subgroup `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_022` = 0 had mean -0.3427 vs -0.3335 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect -0.0093, p=0.4012. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.0865 (p=0.0702).

Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_POLR2A: subgroup `feature_010` = "basal" AND `feature_030` = 0 had mean -0.4022 vs -0.4197 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect 0.0175, p=0.0320. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.0854 (p=0.0055).

Systematic pairwise heterogeneity screen for dependency_RPL11: subgroup `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_020` = 1 had mean -0.1776 vs -0.2701 outside the subgroup; signed subgroup effect 0.0924, p=0.0074. The corresponding two-way interaction contrast was 0.1049 (p=0.0042).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `feature_011` = "colorectal" cell lines, `feature_035` = 1 marks a subgroup with substantially more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than colorectal cell lines with `feature_035` = 0.

analyses.result_summary: Within feature_011="colorectal", feature_035=1 lines had mean dependency_KIF18A -0.9426 vs -0.2592 for feature_035=0 colorectal lines; signed within-colorectal effect -0.6834, p=0 (n=3924 vs 1891).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `dependency_KIF18A` effect of the `feature_011` = "colorectal" and `feature_035` = 1 subgroup is enabled when `feature_020` = 0 and suppressed when `feature_020` = 1; therefore the complete high-dependency subgroup is `feature_011` = "colorectal", `feature_035` = 1, and `feature_020` = 0.

analyses.result_summary: Complete subgroup test: feature_011="colorectal" AND feature_035=1 AND feature_020=0 had mean dependency_KIF18A -1.0924 vs -0.2526 outside the subgroup; signed effect -0.8398, p=0 (n=3225).

Suppressor check inside colorectal/feature_035=1 lines: feature_020=0 lines had mean dependency_KIF18A -1.0924 vs -0.2516 among colorectal/feature_035=1 lines with feature_020=1; signed effect -0.8408, p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `dependency_BRAF`, `feature_009` = 1 is the primary supported main-effect pattern and is associated with more negative dependency scores; pairwise heterogeneity is smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect.

For `dependency_EGFR`, `feature_022` = 1 is the primary supported main-effect pattern and is associated with more negative dependency scores; pairwise heterogeneity is smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect.

For `dependency_ERBB2`, `feature_024` = 1 is the primary supported main-effect pattern and is associated with more negative dependency scores; pairwise heterogeneity is smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect.

For `dependency_KRAS`, `feature_014` = 1 is the primary supported main-effect pattern and is associated with more negative dependency scores; pairwise heterogeneity is smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect.

For `dependency_RIT1`, `feature_027` = 1 is the primary supported main-effect pattern and is associated with more negative dependency scores; pairwise heterogeneity is smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect.

For `dependency_TMED10`, higher `feature_026` values is the primary supported main-effect pattern and is associated with more negative dependency scores; pairwise heterogeneity is smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect.

For `dependency_DHX9`, higher `feature_016` values is the primary supported main-effect pattern and is associated with more negative dependency scores; pairwise heterogeneity is smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect.

For `dependency_POLR2A`, higher `feature_016` values is the primary supported main-effect pattern and is associated with more negative dependency scores; pairwise heterogeneity is smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect.

For `dependency_RPL11`, higher `feature_016` values is the primary supported main-effect pattern and is associated with more negative dependency scores; pairwise heterogeneity is smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect.

analyses.result_summary: Cross-outcome synthesis for dependency_BRAF: strongest univariate effect was -0.5552 for feature_009=1 (p=0). The strongest pairwise heterogeneity subgroup effect was 0.0308 for `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_014` = 0 (p=0.0154), smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect (-0.8398).

Cross-outcome synthesis for dependency_EGFR: strongest univariate effect was -0.3488 for feature_022=1 (p=0). The strongest pairwise heterogeneity subgroup effect was 0.0859 for `feature_011` = "prostate" AND `feature_021` = 1 (p=0.0038), smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect (-0.8398).

Cross-outcome synthesis for dependency_ERBB2: strongest univariate effect was -0.4322 for feature_024=1 (p=0). The strongest pairwise heterogeneity subgroup effect was -0.0197 for `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_027` = 0 (p=0.1354), smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect (-0.8398).

Cross-outcome synthesis for dependency_KRAS: strongest univariate effect was -0.3075 for feature_014=1 (p=0). The strongest pairwise heterogeneity subgroup effect was 0.0738 for `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_020` = 1 (p=0.0348), smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect (-0.8398).

Cross-outcome synthesis for dependency_RIT1: strongest univariate effect was -0.0956 for feature_027=1 (p=0). The strongest pairwise heterogeneity subgroup effect was 0.0850 for `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_021` = 1 (p=0.0201), smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect (-0.8398).

Cross-outcome synthesis for dependency_TMED10: strongest univariate effect was -0.1042 for feature_026 (p=1.332e-15). The strongest pairwise heterogeneity subgroup effect was 0.1015 for `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_014` = 1 (p=0.0017), smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect (-0.8398).

Cross-outcome synthesis for dependency_DHX9: strongest univariate effect was -0.1086 for feature_016 (p=0). The strongest pairwise heterogeneity subgroup effect was -0.0093 for `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_022` = 0 (p=0.4012), smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect (-0.8398).

Cross-outcome synthesis for dependency_POLR2A: strongest univariate effect was -0.3049 for feature_016 (p=0). The strongest pairwise heterogeneity subgroup effect was 0.0175 for `feature_010` = "basal" AND `feature_030` = 0 (p=0.0320), smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect (-0.8398).

Cross-outcome synthesis for dependency_RPL11: strongest univariate effect was -0.1150 for feature_016 (p=0). The strongest pairwise heterogeneity subgroup effect was 0.0924 for `feature_010` = "her2_enriched" AND `feature_020` = 1 (p=0.0074), smaller than the complete KIF18A subgroup effect (-0.8398).

proposed_hypotheses.text: An exhaustive three-feature search over the strongest KIF18A modifiers should recover the same complete KIF18A subgroup: `feature_011` = "colorectal", `feature_035` = 1, and `feature_020` = 0.

analyses.result_summary: Three-feature subgroup screen over top KIF18A predicates: strongest candidate was `feature_011` = "colorectal" AND `feature_035` = 1 AND `feature_028` in its top quartile (>= 0.819) with effect -0.8591 (p=0, n=3132). The explicit complete subgroup feature_011="colorectal" AND feature_035=1 AND feature_020=0 had effect -0.8398 (p=0, n=3225).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A multivariable interaction model for `dependency_KIF18A` will show that the colorectal/feature_035=1/feature_020=0 subgroup remains strongly negative after accounting for the main effects of `feature_011`, `feature_035`, and `feature_020`.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model dependency_KIF18A ~ colorectal + feature_035_1 + feature_020_0 + complete_subgroup estimated the complete-subgroup coefficient at -0.8326 (SE 0.0108, p=0), confirming a strong negative interaction beyond marginal feature effects.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The complete `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is robust to comparing against near-neighbor cell lines that satisfy two of the three predicates `feature_011` = "colorectal", `feature_035` = 1, and `feature_020` = 0, rather than against the entire dataset.

analyses.result_summary: Near-neighbor comparison: complete subgroup lines had mean dependency_KIF18A -1.0924 vs -0.2543 among lines satisfying two of the three predicates but not the complete subgroup; signed effect -0.8381, p=0 (n=3225 vs 6899).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The complete subgroup `feature_011` = "colorectal", `feature_035` = 1, and `feature_020` = 0 is specific for `dependency_KIF18A` and does not induce comparably negative shifts in `dependency_BRAF`, `dependency_EGFR`, `dependency_ERBB2`, `dependency_KRAS`, `dependency_RIT1`, `dependency_TMED10`, `dependency_DHX9`, `dependency_POLR2A`, or `dependency_RPL11`.

analyses.result_summary: Applying the complete KIF18A subgroup to all other dependency outcomes found no comparable negative dependency effect. The largest absolute non-KIF18A shift was dependency_KRAS effect -0.0494 (p=1.087e-12), much smaller than dependency_KIF18A effect -0.8398.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final best-supported interaction-defined dependency subgroup: cell lines with `feature_011` = "colorectal", `feature_035` = 1, and `feature_020` = 0 have markedly more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores, while other dependency outcomes show primary main effects but no comparably strong multifeature heterogeneity.

analyses.result_summary: Final synthesis: the complete KIF18A subgroup had signed effect -0.8398 vs all other lines (p=0, n=3225), remained negative in stratified and adjusted tests, and was outcome-specific. Non-KIF18A outcomes had supported main effects but smaller strongest pairwise subgroup effects (dependency_BRAF:0.0308, dependency_EGFR:0.0859, dependency_ERBB2:-0.0197, dependency_KRAS:0.0738, dependency_RIT1:0.0850, dependency_TMED10:0.1015, dependency_DHX9:-0.0093, dependency_POLR2A:0.0175, dependency_RPL11:0.0924).
